descriptionShort: NHL preseason game footage: Boston Bruins vs. New York Islanders, featuring Richmond Sockeyes alumni Matt Hervey and Mick Vukota.
descriptionLong: Archival game footage from September 28, 1991, capturing an NHL preseason matchup between the Boston Bruins and New York Islanders. The video documents Richmond Sockeyes alumnus Matt Hervey (Bruins) and Mick Vukota (Islanders) during their professional careers in the National Hockey League, likely showing their playing time or a notable interaction during the contest.
